title: Hatchling
storyPurpose: Spark emerges, panics with small pulse, hides behind Bramblefox; Mira kneels.

panels.description: Spark emerges fully — Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, unstable glow when frightened, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Wet fur, trembling.
Small uncontrolled cyan-gold energy pulse knocks leaves; Wisplet drifts back.
Spark presses hard against Bramblefox's flank, refusing everyone else.
Mira kneels at a respectful distance, open empty hands — not grabbing.

bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
bubbles.text: I'm not going to grab you. Invite only.
Compact starts at the first breath.

dialogue.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
dialogue.text: I'm not going to grab you. Invite only.

captions.text: Compact starts at the first breath.
